mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_name, c.id, c.like_num, c.create_time, u.headimgurl, c.content, c.parent_id, c.top_id, p_user.user_name AS parent_user_name, p_user.user_id as parent_user_id, c.user_id, c.reply_num
,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM lkt_bbs_comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id and cl.user_id = #{like_user_id} ) AS is_like
,IFNULL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lkt_bbs_post_comment c2 WHERE c2.parent_id = c.id AND c2.recycle = 0), 0 ) AS has_sub_comments FROM lkt_bbs_post_comment c LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lkt_bbs_post p ON p.id = c.post_id LEFT JOIN lkt_bbs_post_comment parent_c ON parent_c.id = c.parent_id LEFT JOIN lkt_user p_user ON parent_c.user_id = p_user.user_id
ORDER BY c.like_num DESC, c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageNo},#{pageSize}

SELECT count(1) FROM lkt_bbs_post_comment c INNER JOIN lkt_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lkt_bbs_post p ON p.id = c.post_id LEFT JOIN lkt_bbs_post_comment parent ON c.parent_id = parent.id LEFT JOIN lkt_user parent_user ON parent.user_id = parent_user.user_id
mapper.update:
update lkt_bbs_post_comment set recycle = 1 where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_name, c.id, c.like_num, DATE_FORMAT( c.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS create_time, u.headimgurl, c.content, c.parent_id, c.user_id, p_user.user_name AS parent_user_name
,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM lkt_bbs_comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id and cl.user_id = #{like_user_id} ) AS is_like
FROM lkt_bbs_post_comment c LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lkt_bbs_post p ON p.id = c.post_id LEFT JOIN lkt_bbs_post_comment parent_c ON parent_c.id = c.parent_id LEFT JOIN lkt_user p_user ON parent_c.user_id = p_user.user_id
WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.recycle = 0 ORDER BY c.like_num DESC, c.create_time DESC limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}
